episodes.title: Missing Daughter Cult Abduction Satanic Ritual Abuse A Father's Love Unstoppable Fight to Find Her
episodes.description:
She told him she was taking their daughter to the library. He watched them walk down the stairs. He never saw Adelle again.
P

December 27, 2010. Adelle Bryson was three years old. She was abducted and kidnapped by a cult. This is one of the most devastating and heroic stories you will ever hear  a father who crossed an ocean, faced a corrupt system, survived 50 months of imprisonment, and has never stopped fighting for a little girl who was taken into a multigenerational cult network before she even had words to understand what was happening to her.
My guest today is Iain Bryson, a husband, father, author, advocate, and a man whose love refused to quit no matter what it cost him. He is the author of I Love You Like One, part testimony, part love letter to his daughter, part unflinching exposure of what satanic ritual abuse and trauma-based mind control actually do to real families and real children.
In this episode, Iain and I talk about: 
🔹 The day Adelle was abducted and what the days that followed were like 🔹 What it means to unknowingly marry into a multigenerational cult family 🔹 How Agata  his first wife  was herself a victim with invisible chains 
🔹 His 50 months of wrongful imprisonment in Poland 
🔹 Trauma-based mind control and why escape is so complicated 
🔹 How faith sustained him when the world went silent 
🔹 His extraordinary capacity to forgive — even those who caused the most harm 
🔹 What he wants every survivor to know who was never fought for. 
I also share the original song I wrote for Iain and Adelle — I Love You Like One — inspired by the parable of the shepherd who leaves the ninety-nine to go after the one. Because when I learned what this man gave up for his daughter, something about the love of God became real to me in a way I had never seen before. This episode is for every survivor who grew up wondering if anyone would ever fight for them. The answer is yes.
📖 Iain's book: I Love You Like One — available on Amazon 
🎵 Song: I Love You Like One by Unchained Sacred Echo 
AriseandShineAfterAbuse.com for resources on ritual abuse and mind control. 
"Exposing the darkness because God never gives up." — Ephesians 5:11
If this episode moved you, please SHARE IT. This story deserves to be heard by millions. Not someday. Today.
